headline: Amazon updated 2023’s Fire HD 10 tablet with 4GB of RAM
summary: Amazon quietly upgraded the 2023 Fire HD 10 tablet. It now features 4GB of RAM, an increase from the previous 3GB. This update applies to the 32GB storage version.

headline: While you’re watching the World Cup, the feds may be watching you
summary: The US is cohosting the World Cup and celebrating America250. Spectators and city residents may be under surveillance during these events. Concerns are raised about widespread monitoring from Kansas City to New York.

headline: This slim camera has a transparent LCD screen for a viewfinder
summary: Standalone point-and-shoot cameras are experiencing a resurgence in popularity. Godox, known for lighting, launched the C100 digital camera. It features a unique transparent LCD screen for its viewfinder.

headline: I finally got my Trump phone
summary: The Verge waited over a year to receive the Trump Mobile T1 Phone 8002. The reviewer finally has the 'gold version' in hand. This marks the arrival of the much-discussed 'Trump phone'.

headline: Marvel Rivals: Captain America's 4th of July Skin Sparks Fan Discussion
summary: NetEase Games released a special 4th of July swimsuit skin for Captain America in Marvel Rivals. The new skin, which includes a 'big package,' has generated buzz among fans. Some initially mistook an element of the skin for a mod.

headline: People Are Worried They’ll Only See Half of The Odyssey If They Miss Out on Imax, But Should They Be?
summary: Concerns are rising that viewers might miss a significant part of 'The Odyssey' if they don't see it in IMAX. The article questions the validity of these fears. It addresses anxieties about the cinematic experience outside of premium formats.

headline: The View From Japan: PlayStation's Push for an All-Digital Future Raises Concern From Gamers and Developers — and a Well-Timed Retweet From Hideo Kojima
summary: Sony announced PlayStation games will be digital-only from January 2028. This move sparked significant backlash from gamers and developers, particularly in Japan. Hideo Kojima's retweet highlighted widespread concerns about game preservation and ownership.

headline: The Complicated History of GTA Controversies
summary: Grand Theft Auto (GTA) has a long and complex history of controversies. Issues range from moral panics to celebrity lawsuits. Hidden sex minigames have also contributed to the game's contentious past.

headline: England v Mexico set to move to earlier kick-off time
summary: England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico may be rescheduled. The kick-off time could be moved earlier on Sunday. This potential change is due to a threat of storms.

headline: Three men found not guilty of journalist Lyra McKee's murder
summary: Three individuals have been acquitted of the murder of journalist Lyra McKee. McKee, 29, was shot in April 2019 during riots in Londonderry. The court delivered the not-guilty verdict.

headline: Nowak killer appeals against conviction and sentence
summary: Vickrum Digwa is appealing his conviction and sentence for the murder of a student. Digwa is currently serving a minimum of 21 years behind bars. He was found guilty of fatally stabbing the victim.

headline: Ukrainian suspect hunted by police after Monaco bomb attack was 'disguised as a man'
summary: Police are searching for a Ukrainian suspect involved in a Monaco bomb attack. The suspect reportedly disguised herself as a man. Officials believe she may not have acted alone and cased the scene for days.
